params.user: User address who will own the wrapper

returns._0: Address of the user's wrapper, or 0 if not deployed

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

batchUpdateWrapperController(address[],a.notice: Batch update controller for multiple wrappers

constructor.notice: Constructor sets USDC address and initial controller

createWrapper(address).notice: Deploy a wrapper for a user using CREATE2 for deterministic address

getWrapper(address).notice: Get wrapper address for a user (returns 0 if not deployed)

getWrapperCount().notice: Get total number of deployed wrappers

predictWrapperAddress(address).notice: Predict wrapper address for a user before deployment

setController(address).notice: Update controller address for all future wrappers

updateWrapperController(address,address).notice: Update controller for a specific wrapper
